basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Sr. Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Sr. Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 04 July 2026 on the official website of IIT Delhi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Delhi Sr. Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech., M.Tech., M.Sc. or equivalent in Computer Science, Data Science, AI, Biomedical Engineering or related, Strong background in machine learning, computer vision, image processing, Proficiency in Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow
qualification.details: B.Tech., M.Tech., M.Sc., or equivalent degree in Computer Science, Computational Mathematics, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Biomedical Engineering, or related discipline with relevant experience in machine learning, computer vision, image processing; Proficiency in Python and ML frameworks like PyTorch, TensorFlow.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Sr. Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Sr. Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Sr. Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Delhi Sr. Project Associate position is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Sr. Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Tech., M.Tech., M.Sc., or an equivalent degree in fields like Computer Science, Data Science, AI, or Biomedical Engineering, with a strong background in machine learning and computer vision.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Sr. Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 57,000/- plus HRA at 27%.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Sr. Project Associate role at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: You need to apply via email. Prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address provided in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Sr. Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Sr. Project Associate position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Sr. Project Associate position is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. What are the essential technical skills required?
faq.answer: Proficiency in Python and machine learning frameworks such as PyTorch and TensorFlow is essential for this role.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all detailed information about the recruitment.
